title: FabFinds It’s Coffee Time Ceramic Mug 350ml Gold Finish Printed Coffee Cup, Stylish Assorted Designs, Durable Ceramic, Gift for Home or Office, Tea & Hot Drink Mug (1, Blush Pink)
features: Stylish Gold Finish Design – Features elegant gold text with “It’s Coffee Time” print, adding a bold, modern touch for coffee lovers.
350ml Everyday Size – Perfect for coffee, tea, or hot chocolate. Generously sized for daily use at home or the office.
Assorted Modern Designs – Each mug comes in a trendy, minimal print. A fun surprise with every order.
Durable Ceramic Build – Made from quality ceramic with a smooth glazed finish. Easy to clean and made to last.
Great Gift Idea – Ideal for coffee fans, coworkers, or mug collectors. Perfect for birthdays, housewarmings, or stocking fillers.
description: Make every sip feel special with the “It’s Coffee Time” Ceramic Mug, crafted with a smooth gold finish and stylish printed text. Designed for those who love their brew with a touch of flair, this 350ml mug is ideal for coffee, tea, hot chocolate, or any hot drink you enjoy. Made from durable ceramic with a glossy finish, it’s perfect for everyday use – whether at your desk, breakfast table, or curled up on the sofa. Each mug comes in a selection of assorted modern designs, making every purchase feel unique. Whether you’re upgrading your own mug collection or gifting it to a friend, this chic and practical coffee cup brings a little joy to every brew.
